/CAL:PRELIM HRG/DA 170,6JUD:PERKER MEEKS/MO GRTD /X:IF DEFENDANT IS ELIGIBLE FOR DRUG COURT, PROCEEDING WITH PRELIMINARY HEARING WILL NOT PREJUDICEHIM FROM ENTERING DRUG COURT, HOWEVER, IF THE PEOPLE HAVE DISCRETION RE CRITERIA FOR DRUG COURT, THE PEOPLE MAY NOT EXERCISE THAT DISCRETION AFTER PRELIMINARY HEARING/WIT SWORN:MICHAEL LEE    /EXHMA:PEOPLE'S 1, EVIDENCE ENVELOPE; PEOPLE'S 1A, BAGGIE WITH GREEN LEAFY SUBSTANCE; PEOPLE'S 1B, LAB REPORT     /EXHM:DEFENDANT'S A, PHOTOGRAPH; DEFENDANT'S B, BOOKING PHOTO/HTA1:1/BAIL:20000/DEFTCUST3/SHERCOM1/
/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW/LD:04-15-09/987,2/BAIL:20000/SAORD/SA2:THE INTERSECTION OF JONES AND GOLDEN GATE AVE,SF/
/TEXT: DEFT WAIVES INST AND ARRAIGNMENT GUILTY PLEA/AMEND:1 TO 11357AHS AMISDEMEANOR/IRRC/PD/FAWC/DEFT ADV ANG:  1/
